steps.title: Use Peru's row
steps.content: The sentence already gives Peru's 1995 production as 0.38 million metric tons. To complete it, read the value in the same row for Peru under the 2020 column.

steps.title: Select the table value
steps.content: Choice A, Choice B, and Choice D give 2020 values from other countries in the table rather than Peru. Peru's 2020 copper production is listed as 2.15 million metric tons. The answer is C.
